Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First, I need to go through each case and identify which activities are repeated. Lets look at the log case by case. Starting with Case C001: Initiate Request once, Verify Documents twice, Call Customer once, Submit Additional once, Approve Request once. So Verify Documents happens twice here.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next, Case C002: Initiate Request once, Verify Documents once, Call Customer twice, Adjust Account once, Approve Request once. Here Call Customer occurs twice.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C003: Initiate Request once, Verify Documents twice, Call Customer once, Adjust Account once, Approve Request once. Verify Documents happens twice.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the recurring activities are: Verify Documents in C001 and C003, Call Customer in C002. For each case: C001 first Verify Documents initial verification documents incomplete, second re-verification after customer provided additional docs. C002 first Call Customer to clarify discrepancy, second follow-up to confirm adjustments. C003 first Verify Documents initial physical verification, second re-verification after account adjustment.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now, for renaming: For Verify Documents: First occurrence Initial Document Verification, Second Re-Verification of Documents. For Call Customer in C002: First Call Customer Discrepancy Clarification, Second Call Customer Follow-up Confirmation.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait the Additional Context for C001s first Verify Documents is Agent checks identity documents. But the Call Customer says Verification incomplete. Ah right so first Verify Documents initial verification that results in finding docs incomplete.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The first occurrence in each case represents the initial verification step, where documents are checked for the first time. The second occurrence represents a re-verification after some intervening action customer submission of additional documents in C001, account adjustment in C003.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This works because both first verifications are initial checks, and both second ones are re-checks, even though the reasons differ post-upload vs post-adjustment. For Call Customer in C002 first to clarify discrepancy, second to confirm adjustments.
